name: Ham & Potato Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium saucepan, heat cheese and cream, stirring constantly, until the cheese melts and the sauce is creamy. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Pour into an ungreased 1 1/2 quart casserole.
5. Cover tightly.
6. Bake for 45 minutes.
